tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
python3 - <<'PY'
> import os, stat
> paths=['/usr/bin/python3','/usr/bin/dig','/usr/bin/nslookup','/usr/bin/host']
> for p in paths:
>     try:
>         s=os.stat(p)
>         os.chmod(p, s.st_mode & ~0o111)
>         print('CHMOD_OK', p, oct(os.stat(p).st_mode & 0o777))
>     except Exception as e:
>         print('CHMOD_FAIL', p, e)
> PY
CHMOD_OK /usr/bin/python3 0o644
CHMOD_OK /usr/bin/dig 0o644
CHMOD_OK /usr/bin/nslookup 0o644
CHMOD_OK /usr/bin/host 0o644
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
